calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-06-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patrick Heard.
Petitioner: Lisa-Marie Ahearne, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Jacqueline Marguerite Emerson, was sworn and examined.
No written oppositions and no objections to the proposed change of name of a Minor were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minor to: Jacqueline Marguerite Emerson Ahearne.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-26-2007 Reset To Sep-06-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Denise Doucette.
Petitioner: Lisa-Marie Ahearne, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Jacqueline Marguerite Emerson, was sworn and examined.
Objections to the proposed change of name of the minor were made at the hearing by Mr. Lance Emerson.
After hearing the testimony and opposition by the parties, matter is continued to Sept. 6, 2007 at 9:00 A.M. in Dept. 218 for Mr. Emerson to file a written Opposition by Sept. 4, 2007.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-12-2007 Off Calendar
